needs_manual.description: 2024 Elk Harvest Report (CPW Widen Collective version)
needs_manual.reason: Widencollective asset share pages are JavaScript-rendered SPAs; cannot extract direct download URL programmatically. State Library version was downloaded instead (2024_elk_harvest_statelib.pdf).

needs_manual.description: 2024 Deer Harvest Report (CPW Widen Collective version)
needs_manual.reason: Widencollective asset share pages are JavaScript-rendered SPAs; cannot extract direct download URL programmatically. State Library version was downloaded instead (2024_deer_harvest_statelib.pdf).
Widencollective asset share page requires JavaScript rendering. Could not extract direct download URL.
Widencollective asset share page requires JavaScript rendering. Could not extract direct download URL.

notes: CPW hosts reports on two platforms: cpw.widen.net (viewer pages with extractable CDN URLs) and cpw.widencollective.com (JS-rendered SPAs requiring browser interaction).
Widen.net viewer pages embed the actual PDF at previews.us-east-1.widencdn.net with signed, time-limited URLs. Downloads were made via these CDN URLs.
The Colorado State Library (spl.cde.state.co.us) hosts harvest reports as direct PDF downloads, providing an alternative to the Widen platform.
Draw Recap reports contain pre-draw application counts by hunt code and preference point level plus post-draw allocation results.
Drawn Out At reports show the minimum preference points needed to draw each hunt code.
All files verified as valid PDF documents (not HTML error pages).
Additional historical draw/harvest reports (2019-2022) are available on both statistics pages if needed.
